{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sector Seventy-two
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sector Seventy-two]] contains corruption in two [[Iterations]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
